sources: varietal inference: Tuscany Sangiovese — bright cherry, high acidity, ~13% ABV

wines.name: Chateau Montaud Cotes de Provence Rose 2024
sources: varietal inference: Cotes de Provence Rosé — dry, mineral, light body, ~13% ABV

wines.name: Chateau La Freynelle Blanc 2025

wines.name: Sur de los Andes Malbec 2024
